title: Documentation of Containerfile format
body:
Where i can find documentation for Containerfile format using in podman and buildah?
What different in Dockerfile and Containerfile?

comments.body: Nothing, they are exactly the same.  They are just that Podman/Buildah will look for Containerfile name by default and then Dockerfile.    Is the documentation on this need to be improved in podman build and buildah bud?
